dialog: Yes! Yes! Look how beautiful the curve is! It follows everything! It's— wait.
What's wrong? The line touches every dot! Isn't that perfect?
Those purple dots... the new ones... why am I getting them all wrong? I... I had never seen them before.
Oh no! You memorized the old dots, but you can't understand the new ones!
I memorize, I don't understand. I'm... useless out here.
